description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Pikachu, a well-known character from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features a bright yellow body with large, upright ears tipped in black, round red cheeks, and big, expressive black eyes. Its mouth is open in a cheerful, smiling expression, and it has a small, triangular nose. The back of the toy displays two brown horizontal stripes and a lightning bolt-shaped tail with a brown base and yellow tip. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the toy is proportioned to sit upright with its front limbs resting on the ground. This stuffed toy is compact and lightweight, making it suitable for children to carry or display in urban environments such as parks or playgrounds.
description: A soft, plush Pikachu stuffed toy with yellow fur, black-tipped ears, red cheeks, and a lightning bolt-shaped tail. It sits upright with a cheerful, smiling face.
description_view_0: Front view showing Pikachu's face, red cheeks, open mouth, and both upright ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, one cheek, and the full length of the tail curving behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, two brown stripes, and the full lightning bolt-shaped tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other cheek, ear, and the tail extending outward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open black eyes and an open, smiling mouth. The red cheeks and small nose add to the playful and inviting look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms resting at the front and legs tucked underneath, head facing forward and ears pointed upward.
